# $SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND [2 operations]
#   set? /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass:134
#     ""
#   override[task-populate-sdk-ext]:set /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass:756
#     "${sdk_ext_postinst}"
# pre-expansion value:
#   ""
SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND=""
#
# $SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND:task-populate-sdk-ext
#   set /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass:756
#     "${sdk_ext_postinst}"
SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND:task-populate-sdk-ext="	printf \"\nExtracting buildtools...\n\" \
	cd \$target_sdk_dir \
	env_setup_script=\"\$target_sdk_dir/environment-setup-aarch64-oe4t-linux\" \
        if [ -n \"\${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER}\" ]; then \
		printf \"buildtools\ny\" | ./\${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER} > buildtools.log || { printf 'ERROR: buildtools installation failed:\n' ; cat buildtools.log ; echo \"printf 'ERROR: this SDK was not fully installed and needs reinstalling\n'\" >> \$env_setup_script ; exit 1 ; } \
 \
		# Delete the buildtools tar file since it won't be used again \
		rm -f ./\${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER} \
		# We don't need the log either since it succeeded \
		rm -f buildtools.log \
 \
		# Make sure when the user sets up the environment, they also get \
		# the buildtools-tarball tools in their path. \
		echo \"# Save and reset OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT as buildtools may change it\" >> \$env_setup_script \
		echo \"SAVED=\\"\\$OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT\\"\" >> \$env_setup_script \
		echo \". \$target_sdk_dir/buildtools/environment-setup*\" >> \$env_setup_script \
		echo \"export OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT=\\"\\$SAVED\\"\" >> \$env_setup_script \
	fi \
 \
	# Allow bitbake environment setup to be ran as part of this sdk. \
	echo \"export OE_SKIP_SDK_CHECK=1\" >> \$env_setup_script \
	# Work around runqemu not knowing how to get this information within the eSDK \
	echo \"export DEPLOY_DIR_IMAGE=\$target_sdk_dir/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001\" >> \$env_setup_script \
 \
	# A bit of another hack, but we need this in the path only for devtool \
	# so put it at the end of \$PATH. \
	echo \"export PATH=\\"\$target_sdk_dir/\${esdk_tools_path}:\\$PATH\\"\" >> \$env_setup_script \
 \
	echo \"printf 'SDK environment now set up; additionally you may now run devtool to perform development tasks.\nRun devtool --help for further details.\n'\" >> \$env_setup_script \
 \
	# Warn if trying to use external bitbake and the ext SDK together \
	echo \"(which bitbake > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'WARNING: attempting to use the extensible SDK in an environment set up to run bitbake - this may lead to unexpected results. Please source this script in a new shell session instead.') || true\" >> \$env_setup_script \
 \
	if [ \"\$prepare_buildsystem\" != \"no\" -a -n \"\${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER}\" ]; then \
		printf \"Preparing build system...\n\" \
		# dash which is /bin/sh on Ubuntu will not preserve the \
		# current working directory when first ran, nor will it set \$1 when \
		# sourcing a script. That is why this has to look so ugly. \
		LOGFILE=\"\$target_sdk_dir/preparing_build_system.log\" \
		sh -c \". buildtools/environment-setup* > \$LOGFILE 2>&1 && cd \$target_sdk_dir/\`dirname \${oe_init_build_env_path}\` && set \$target_sdk_dir && . \$target_sdk_dir/\${oe_init_build_env_path} \$target_sdk_dir >> \$LOGFILE 2>&1 && python3 \$target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py \$LOGFILE ''\" || { echo \"printf 'ERROR: this SDK was not fully installed and needs reinstalling\n'\" >> \$env_setup_script ; exit 1 ; } \
	fi \
	if [ -e \$target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py ]; then \
		rm \$target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py \
	fi \
	echo done \
"

# $SDK_PREFIX

SDK_PREFIX="x86_64-tdsdk-linux-"
#
# $SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND [2 operations]
#   set? /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass:133
#     ""
#   override[task-populate-sdk-ext]:set /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass:705
#     "${sdk_ext_preinst}"
# pre-expansion value:
#   ""
SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND=""
#
# $SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND:task-populate-sdk-ext
#   set /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass:705
#     "${sdk_ext_preinst}"
SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND:task-populate-sdk-ext="	# Since bitbake won't run as root it doesn't make sense to try and install \
	# the extensible sdk as root. \
	if [ \"\`id -u\`\" = \"0\" ]; then \
		echo \"ERROR: The extensible sdk cannot be installed as root.\" \
		exit 1 \
	fi \
	if ! command -v locale > /dev/null; then \
		echo \"ERROR: The installer requires the locale command, please install it first\" \
		exit 1 \
	fi \
        # Check setting of LC_ALL set above \
	canonicalised_locale=\`echo \$LC_ALL | sed 's/UTF-8/utf8/'\` \
	if ! locale -a | grep -q \$canonicalised_locale ; then \
		echo \"ERROR: the installer requires the \$LC_ALL locale to be installed (but not selected), please install it first\" \
		exit 1 \
	fi \
	# The relocation script used by buildtools installer requires python \
	if ! command -v python3 > /dev/null; then \
		echo \"ERROR: The installer requires python3, please install it first\" \
		exit 1 \
	fi \
	missing_utils=\"\" \
	for util in \${SDK_REQUIRED_UTILITIES}; do \
		if ! command -v \$util > /dev/null; then \
			missing_utils=\"\$missing_utils \$util\" \
		fi \
	done \
	if [ -n \"\$missing_utils\" ] ; then \
		echo \"ERROR: the SDK requires the following missing utilities, please install them: \$missing_utils\" \
		exit 1 \
	fi \
	SDK_EXTENSIBLE=\"1\" \
	if [ \"\$publish\" = \"1\" ] && [ \"full\" = \"minimal\" ] ; then \
		EXTRA_TAR_OPTIONS=\"\$EXTRA_TAR_OPTIONS --exclude=sstate-cache\" \
	fi \
"

# line: 108, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
IMAGE_CMD:btrfs() {
	size=${ROOTFS_SIZE}
	if [ ${size} -lt 16384 ] ; then
		size=16384
		bbwarn "Rootfs size is too small for BTRFS. Filesystem will be extended to ${size}K"
	fi
	dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.btrfs seek=${size} count=0 bs=1024
	mkfs.btrfs  -r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.btrfs
}

# line: 156, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
IMAGE_CMD:cpio() {
	(cd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs && find . | sort | cpio --reproducible -o -H newc >/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.cpio)
	# We only need the /init symlink if we're building the real
	# image. The -dbg image doesn't need it! By being clever
	# about this we also avoid 'touch' below failing, as it
	# might be trying to touch /sbin/init on the host since both
	# the normal and the -dbg image share the same WORKDIR
	if [ "${IMAGE_BUILDING_DEBUGFS}" != "true" ]; then
		if [ ! -L /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/init ] && [ ! -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/init ]; then
			if [ -L /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init ] || [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init ]; then
				ln -sf /sbin/init /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/cpio_append/init
                                touch -h -r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/cpio_append/init
			else
                                touch -r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/cpio_append/init
			fi
			(cd  /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/cpio_append && echo ./init | cpio --reproducible -oA -H newc -F /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.cpio)
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 255, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
IMAGE_CMD:f2fs() {
        # We need to add additional smarts here form devices smaller than 1.5G
        # Need to scale appropriately between 40M -> 1.5G as the "overprovision
        # ratio" goes down as the device gets bigger (70% -> 4.5%), below about
        # 500M the standard IMAGE_OVERHEAD_FACTOR does not work, so add additional
        # space here when under 500M
	size=${ROOTFS_SIZE}
	if [ ${size} -lt 524288 ] ; then
		size=524288
		bbwarn "Rootfs size is too small for F2FS. Filesystem will be extended to ${size}K"
	fi
	dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.f2fs seek=${size} count=0 bs=1024
	mkfs.f2fs  /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.f2fs
	sload.f2fs -f /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.f2fs
}

# expansion of IMAGE_CMD:multiubi threw ExpansionError: Failure expanding variable IMAGE_CMD:multiubi, expression was 	${@' '.join(['%s_%s="%s";' % (arg, name, d.getVar('%s_%s' % (arg, name))) for arg in d.getVar('MULTIUBI_ARGS').split() for name in d.getVar('MULTIUBI_BUILD').split()])}
	# Split MKUBIFS_ARGS_<name> and UBINIZE_ARGS_<name>
	for name in ${MULTIUBI_BUILD}; do
		eval local mkubifs_args=\"\$MKUBIFS_ARGS_${name}\"
		eval local ubinize_args=\"\$UBINIZE_ARGS_${name}\"

		multiubi_mkfs "${mkubifs_args}" "${ubinize_args}" "${name}"
	done

The variable dependency chain for the failure is: IMAGE_CMD:multiubi
# line: 247, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass

}

# line: 74, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types_wic.bbclass
IMAGE_CMD:wic() {
	out="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451"
	build_wic="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/build-wic"
	tmp_wic="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/tmp-wic"
	wks=""
	if [ -e "$tmp_wic" ]; then
		# Ensure we don't have any junk leftover from a previously interrupted
		# do_image_wic execution
		rm -rf "$tmp_wic"
	fi
	if [ -z "$wks" ]; then
		bbfatal "No kickstart files from WKS_FILES were found: demo-image-full.p3768-0000-p3767-0001.wks demo-image-full.wks. Please set WKS_FILE or WKS_FILES appropriately."
	fi
	BUILDDIR="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build" PSEUDO_UNLOAD=1 wic create --debug "$wks" --vars "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/sysroots/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/imgdata/" -e "demo-image-full" -o "$build_wic/" -w "$tmp_wic" 

	# look to see if the user specifies a custom imager
	IMAGER=direct
	eval set -- " --"
	while [ 1 ]; do
		case "$1" in
			--imager|-i)
				shift
				IMAGER=$1
				;;
			--)
				shift
				break
				;;
		esac
		shift
	done
	mv "$build_wic/$(basename "${wks%.wks}")"*.${IMAGER} "$out.wic"
}

}

# line: 264, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
add_empty_root_password_note() {
	if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/shadow -a -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/issue ]; then
		rootpw="`grep '^root:' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/shadow | cut -d':' -f2`"
		rootpw_lastchanged="`grep "^root:" /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/shadow | cut -d: -f3`"
		if [ -z "$rootpw" -a "$rootpw_lastchanged" != "0" ]; then
			echo "Type 'root' to login with superuser privileges (no password will be asked)." >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/issue
			echo "" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/issue
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 399, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/base.bbclass
base_do_compile() {
	if [ -e Makefile -o -e makefile -o -e GNUmakefile ]; then
		oe_runmake || die "make failed"
	else
		bbnote "nothing to compile"
	fi
}

# line: 379, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/base.bbclass
base_do_configure() {
	if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate" -a -e "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate" ]; then
		if [ "`cat /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate`" != "${BB_TASKHASH}" ]; then
			cd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sources/demo-image-full-1.0
			if [ "0" != "1" -a \( -e Makefile -o -e makefile -o -e GNUmakefile \) ]; then
				oe_runmake clean
			fi
			# -ignore_readdir_race does not work correctly with -delete;
			# use xargs to avoid spurious build failures
			find /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sources/demo-image-full-1.0 -ignore_readdir_race -name \*.la -type f -print0 | xargs -0 rm -f
		fi
	fi
	if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate" ]; then
		mkdir -p `dirname /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate`
		echo ${BB_TASKHASH} > /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/configure.sstate
	fi
}

}

# line: 97, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/logging.bbclass
bbdebug() {
	USAGE='Usage: bbdebug [123] "message"'
	if [ $# -lt 2 ]; then
		bbfatal "$USAGE"
	fi

	# Strip off the debug level and ensure it is an integer
	DBGLVL=$1; shift
	NONDIGITS=$(echo "$DBGLVL" | tr -d "[:digit:]")
	if [ "$NONDIGITS" ]; then
		bbfatal "$USAGE"
	fi

	# All debug output is printed to the logs
	if [ -p /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/fifo.125805 ] ; then
		printf "%b\0" "bbdebug $DBGLVL $*" > /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/fifo.125805
	else
		echo "DEBUG: $*"
	fi
}

# line: 362, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
check_git_config() {
	if ! git config user.email > /dev/null ; then
		git config --local user.email "oe.patch@oe"
	fi
	if ! git config user.name > /dev/null ; then
		git config --local user.name "OpenEmbedded"
	fi
}

# line: 348, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
copy_dtb_overlays() {
    local destination=$1
    local dtb dtbf extdtb
    local extraoverlays=" "
    shift
    if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-initrd-flash-initramfs-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.cboot" ]; then
        extraoverlays="$extraoverlays L4TConfiguration-rcmboot.dtbo"
    fi
    if false; then
        extraoverlays="$extraoverlays UefiDefaultSecurityKeys.dtbo"
    fi
    for dtb in "$@" tegra234-carveouts.dtbo tegra-optee.dtbo tegra234-p3768-0000+p3767-0000-dynamic.dtbo $extraoverlays; do
        dtbf=`basename $dtb`
        if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree" ]; then
            local extdtb=$(find "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree" -name $dtbf -printf '%P' 2>/dev/null)
	    if [ -n "$extdtb" ]; then
	        bbnote "Copying external overlay $extdtb to $destination"
		cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree/$extdtb" $destination/$dtbf
		continue
	    fi
	fi
	bbnote "Copying overlay $dtb to $destination"
	cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/$dtb" $destination/$dtbf
    done
}

# line: 311, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
copy_dtbs() {
    local destination=$1
    local dtb dtbf
    if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree" ]; then
        for dtbcand in tegra234-p3768-0000+p3767-0001-nv-super.dtb; do
            dtb=$(find "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree" -name "$(basename $dtbcand)" -printf '%P' 2>/dev/null)
	    if [ -z "$dtb" ]; then
	        bbwarn "Not found in /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree: $dtbcand"
		continue
	    fi
            dtbf=`basename $dtb`
            if [ -e $destination/$dtbf ]; then
                bbnote "Overwriting $destination/$dtbf with EXTERNAL_KERNEL_DEVICETREE content"
                rm -f $destination/$dtbf $destination/$dtbf.signed
            fi
            bbnote "Copying EXTERNAL_KERNEL_DEVICETREE entry $dtb to $destination"
            cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree/$dtb" $destination/$dtbf
	    if false; then
                cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/boot/devicetree/$dtb.signed" $destination/$dtbf.signed
	    fi
        done
    else
	for dtb in tegra234-p3768-0000+p3767-0001-nv-super.dtb; do
            dtbf=`basename $dtb`
            if [ -e $destination/$dtbf ]; then
            bbnote "Overwriting $destination/$dtbf with KERNEL_DEVICETREE content"
            rm -f $destination/$dtbf $destination/$dtbf.signed
            fi
            bbnote "Copying KERNEL_DEVICETREE entry $dtbf to $destination"
            cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/$dtbf" $destination/$dtbf
	    if false; then
            cp -L "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/$dtbf.signed" $destination/$dtbf.signed
	    fi
	done
    fi
}

# line: 192, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
create_cmdline_shebang_wrapper() {
	# Create a wrapper script where commandline options are needed
	#
	# These are useful to work around shebang relocation issues, where shebangs are too
	# long or have arguments in them, thus preventing them from using the /usr/bin/env
	# shebang
	#
	# Usage: create_cmdline_wrapper FILENAME <extra-options>

	cmd=$1
	shift

	echo "Generating wrapper script for $cmd"

	# Strip #! and get remaining interpreter + arg
	argument="$(sed -ne 's/^#! *//p;q' $cmd)"
	# strip the shebang from the real script as we do not want it to be usable anyway
	tail -n +2 $cmd > $cmd.real
	chown --reference=$cmd $cmd.real
	chmod --reference=$cmd $cmd.real
	rm -f $cmd
	cmdname=$(basename $cmd)
	dirname=$(dirname $cmd)
	cmdoptions=$@
	if [ "" != "" ]; then
		relpath=`python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.relpath('/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image', '$dirname'))"`
		cmdoptions=`echo $@ | sed -e "s::\\$realdir/$relpath:g"`
	fi
	cat <<END >$cmd
#!/usr/bin/env bash
realpath=\`readlink -fn \$0\`
realdir=\`dirname \$realpath\`
exec -a \$realdir/$cmdname $argument \$realdir/$cmdname.real $cmdoptions "\$@"
END
	chmod +x $cmd
}

# line: 162, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
create_cmdline_wrapper() {
	# Create a wrapper script where commandline options are needed
	#
	# These are useful to work around relocation issues, by passing extra options
	# to a program
	#
	# Usage: create_cmdline_wrapper FILENAME <extra-options>

	cmd=$1
	shift

	echo "Generating wrapper script for $cmd"

	mv $cmd $cmd.real
	cmdname=`basename $cmd`
	dirname=`dirname $cmd`
	cmdoptions=$@
	if [ "" != "" ]; then
		relpath=`python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.relpath('/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image', '$dirname'))"`
		cmdoptions=`echo $@ | sed -e "s::\\$realdir/$relpath:g"`
	fi
	cat <<END >$cmd
#!/bin/bash
realpath=\`readlink -fn \$0\`
realdir=\`dirname \$realpath\`
exec -a \$realdir/$cmdname \$realdir/$cmdname.real $cmdoptions "\$@"
END
	chmod +x $cmd
}

# line: 187, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass
create_merged_usr_symlinks() {
    root="$1"
    install -d $root/usr/bin $root/usr/sbin $root/usr/lib
    ln -rs $root/usr/bin $root/bin
    ln -rs $root/usr/sbin $root/sbin
    ln -rs $root/usr/lib $root/lib

    if [ "/usr/lib" != "/usr/lib" ]; then
       install -d $root/usr/lib
       ln -rs $root/usr/lib $root/lib
    fi

    # create base links for multilibs
    multi_libdirs=""
    for d in $multi_libdirs; do
        install -d $root/usr/$d
        ln -rs $root/usr/$d $root/$d
    done
}

# line: 685, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image.bbclass
create_merged_usr_symlinks_rootfs() {
    create_merged_usr_symlinks /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs
}

# line: 207, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass
create_merged_usr_symlinks_sdk() {
    create_merged_usr_symlinks /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image/usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/aarch64-oe4t-linux
}

# line: 274, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass
create_sdk_files() {
	cp /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/scripts/relocate_sdk.py /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image//usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/

	# Replace the ##DEFAULT_INSTALL_DIR## with the correct pattern.
	# Escape special characters like '+' and '.' in the SDKPATH
	escaped_sdkpath=$(echo /usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath |sed -e "s:[\+\.]:\\\\\\\\\0:g")
	sed -i -e "s:##DEFAULT_INSTALL_DIR##:$escaped_sdkpath:" /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image//usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/relocate_sdk.py

       mkdir -p /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image//usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/x86_64-tdsdk-linux/etc/
       echo '/usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/x86_64-tdsdk-linux/usr/lib
/usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/x86_64-tdsdk-linux/lib
include /etc/ld.so.conf' > /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image//usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/x86_64-tdsdk-linux/etc/ld.so.conf
}

create_shar() {
	# copy in the template shar extractor script
	cp /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/files/toolchain-shar-extract.sh /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.sh

	rm -f /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/pre_install_command /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/post_install_command

	if [ "1" = "1" ] ; then
		cp /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/files/toolchain-shar-relocate.sh /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/post_install_command
	fi
	cat << "EOF" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/pre_install_command

EOF

	cat << "EOF" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/post_install_command

EOF
	sed -i -e '/@SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND@/r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/pre_install_command' \
		-e '/@SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND@/r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/temp/post_install_command' \
		/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.sh

	# substitute variables
	sed -i -e 's#@SDK_ARCH@#x86_64#g' \
		-e 's#@SDKPATH@#/usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath#g' \
		-e 's#@SDKPATHINSTALL@#/opt/tegrademo/6.1+snapshot#g' \
		-e 's#@SDKEXTPATH@#~/tegrademo_sdk#g' \
		-e 's#@OLDEST_KERNEL@#3.2.0#g' \
		-e 's#@REAL_MULTIMACH_TARGET_SYS@#aarch64-oe4t-linux#g' \
		-e 's#@SDK_TITLE@#OE4Tegra Demonstration Distro SDK#g' \
		-e 's#@SDK_VERSION@#6.1+snapshot#g' \
		-e '/@SDK_PRE_INSTALL_COMMAND@/d' \
		-e '/@SDK_POST_INSTALL_COMMAND@/d' \
		-e 's#@SDK_ARCHIVE_TYPE@#tar.xz#g' \
		/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.sh

	# add execution permission
	chmod +x /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.sh

	# append the SDK tarball
	cat /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.tar.xz >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.sh

	# delete the old tarball, we don't need it anymore
	rm /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/x86_64-deploy-demo-image-full-populate-sdk/tegrademo-glibc-x86_64-demo-image-full-aarch64-p3768-0000-p3767-0001-toolchain-6.1+snapshot.tar.xz
}

# line: 435, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
create_tegraflash_pkg() {
    local oldwd="$PWD"
    local has_sdcard="no"

    rm -rf /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/tegraflash
    mkdir -p /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/tegraflash
    cd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/tegraflash
    tegraflash_populate_package /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-minimal-initramfs-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.cboot boot.img L4TConfiguration.dtbo,L4TConfiguration-RootfsRedundancyLevelABEnable.dtbo
    if [ -n "esp.img" ]; then
        cp "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-espimage-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.esp" ./esp.img
    fi
    if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-initrd-flash-initramfs-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.cboot" ]; then
        cp "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-initrd-flash-initramfs-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.cboot" ./initrd-flash.img
    fi
    tegraflash_custom_pre
    cp "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs.ext4" ./demo-image-full.ext4
    tegraflash_create_flash_config flash.xml.in boot.img
    if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]+<device type="sdcard"' flash.xml.in; then
        has_sdcard="yes"
    fi
    if [ "1" = "1" ]; then
        tegraflash_create_flash_config external-flash.xml.in boot.img /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/usr/share/tegraflash/external-flash.xml
    fi
    if [ -n "" ]; then
        tegraflash_create_flash_config rcmboot-flash.xml.in boot.img /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/usr/share/tegraflash/
    fi

    if [ -n "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/tegra-initrd-flash-initramfs-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.cboot" ]; then
        rm -f .env.initrd-flash
	cat > .env.initrd-flash <<END
FLASH_HELPER=tegra-flash-helper.sh
BOOTDEV="nvme0n1p1"
ROOTFS_DEVICE="nvme0n1"
CHIPID="0x23"
MACHINE="p3768-0000-p3767-0001"
DEFAULTS[BOARDID]="3767"
DEFAULTS[FAB]="ES1"
DEFAULTS[CHIPREV]="1"
DEFAULTS[BOARDSKU]="0001"
DEFAULTS[BOARDREV]="A.3"
LNXFILE="boot.img"
ROOTFS_IMAGE="demo-image-full.ext4"
DATAFILE=""
EXTERNAL_ROOTFS_DRIVE=1
NO_INTERNAL_STORAGE=1
END
    fi
    cat >boardvars.sh <<EOF
BOARDID="3767"
FAB="ES1"
BOARDSKU="0001"
BOARDREV="A.3"
CHIPREV="1"
CHIP_SKU="00:00:00:D4"
RAMCODE="${TEGRA_FLASHVAR_RAMCODE}"
EOF
    if [ "$has_sdcard" = "yes" ]; then
        rm -f dosdcard.sh
        cat > dosdcard.sh <<END
#!/bin/sh
MACHINE=p3768-0000-p3767-0001 BOARDID=\${BOARDID:-3767} FAB=\${FAB:-ES1} CHIPREV=\${CHIPREV:-1} BOARDSKU=\${BOARDSKU:-0001} ./tegra-flash-helper.sh --no-flash --sign $DATAARGS flash.xml.in boot.img demo-image-full.ext4 && ./make-sdcard secureflash.xml "\$@"
END
        chmod +x dosdcard.sh
    fi
    if [ "1" = "1" ]; then
        rm -f doexternal.sh
        cat > doexternal.sh <<END
#!/bin/sh
MACHINE=p3768-0000-p3767-0001 BOARDID=\${BOARDID:-3767} FAB=\${FAB:-ES1} CHIPREV=\${CHIPREV:-1} BOARDSKU=\${BOARDSKU:-0001} ./tegra-flash-helper.sh --no-flash --sign $DATAARGS --external-device external-flash.xml.in boot.img demo-image-full.ext4 && ./make-sdcard secureflash.xml "\$@"
END
        chmod +x doexternal.sh
    fi

    tegraflash_custom_post
    tegraflash_custom_sign_pkg
    tegraflash_finalize_pkg
    cd "$oldwd"
}

# line: 229, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
create_wrapper() {
	# Create a wrapper script where extra environment variables are needed
	#
	# These are useful to work around relocation issues, by setting environment
	# variables which point to paths in the filesystem.
	#
	# Usage: create_wrapper FILENAME [[VAR=VALUE]..]

	cmd=$1
	shift

	echo "Generating wrapper script for $cmd"

	mv $cmd $cmd.real
	cmdname=`basename $cmd`
	dirname=`dirname $cmd`
	exportstring=$@
	if [ "" != "" ]; then
		relpath=`python3 -c "import os; print(os.path.relpath('/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image', '$dirname'))"`
		exportstring=`echo $@ | sed -e "s::\\$realdir/$relpath:g"`
	fi
	cat <<END >$cmd
#!/bin/bash
realpath=\`readlink -fn \$0\`
realdir=\`dirname \$realpath\`
export $exportstring
exec -a "\$0" \$realdir/$cmdname.real "\$@"
END
	chmod +x $cmd
}

do_deploy_source_date_epoch() {
    mkdir -p /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-source-date-epoch
    if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/source-date-epoch/__source_date_epoch.txt ]; then
        echo "Deploying SDE from /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/source-date-epoch/__source_date_epoch.txt -> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-source-date-epoch."
        cp -p /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/source-date-epoch/__source_date_epoch.txt /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-source-date-epoch/__source_date_epoch.txt

    fi
}

# line: 162, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types_wic.bbclass
do_flush_pseudodb() {

# line: 379, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
empty_var_volatile() {
	if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/fstab ]; then
		match=`awk '$1 !~ "#" && $2 ~ /\/var\/volatile/{print $2}' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/fstab 2> /dev/null`
		if [ -n "$match" ]; then
			find /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/var/volatile -mindepth 1 -delete
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 262, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
hardlinkdir() {
	from=$1
	to=$2
	(cd $from; find . -print0 | cpio --null -pdlu $to)
}

# line: 195, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
multiubi_mkfs() {
	local mkubifs_args="$1"
	local ubinize_args="$2"

        # Added prompt error message for ubi and ubifs image creation.
        if [ -z "$mkubifs_args" ] || [ -z "$ubinize_args" ]; then
            bbfatal "MKUBIFS_ARGS and UBINIZE_ARGS have to be set, see http://www.linux-mtd.infradead.org/faq/ubifs.html for details"
        fi

	if [ -z "$3" ]; then
		local vname=""
	else
		local vname="_$3"
	fi
	write_ubi_config "${vname}"

	if [ -n "$vname" ]; then
		mkfs.ubifs -r /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs -o /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubifs ${mkubifs_args}
	fi
	ubinize -o /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubi ${ubinize_args} ubinize${vname}-demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.cfg

	# Cleanup cfg file
	mv ubinize${vname}-demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.cfg /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/

	# Create own symlinks for 'named' volumes
	if [ -n "$vname" ]; then
		cd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete
		if [ -e demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubifs ]; then
			ln -sf demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubifs \
			demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs${vname}.ubifs
		fi
		if [ -e demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubi ]; then
			ln -sf demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451${vname}.ubi \
			demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs${vname}.ubi
		fi
		cd -
	fi
}

# line: 15, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_cboot.bbclass
oe_cbootimg_common() {
    outfile="$2"
    [ -n "$outfile" ] || outfile="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/$1.cboot"
    /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot-native/usr/bin/tegra-flash/mkbootimg \
        --kernel /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001/Image \
        --ramdisk /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/$1 \
        --cmdline 'mminit_loglevel=4 console=ttyTCU0,115200 firmware_class.path=/etc/firmware fbcon=map:0 video=efifb:off console=tty0 efi=runtime nvme.use_threaded_interrupts=1 pci=pcie_bus_perf' \
        --output "$outfile"
    sign_bootimg "$outfile"
    [ -n "$2" ] || ln -sf $1.cboot /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs.cboot
}

# line: 27, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
oe_libinstall() {
	# Purpose: Install a library, in all its forms
	# Example
	#
	# oe_libinstall libltdl /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/usr/lib/
	# oe_libinstall -C src/libblah libblah /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image//usr/lib/
	dir=""
	libtool=""
	silent=""
	require_static=""
	require_shared=""
	while [ "$#" -gt 0 ]; do
		case "$1" in
		-C)
			shift
			dir="$1"
			;;
		-s)
			silent=1
			;;
		-a)
			require_static=1
			;;
		-so)
			require_shared=1
			;;
		-*)
			bbfatal "oe_libinstall: unknown option: $1"
			;;
		*)
			break;
			;;
		esac
		shift
	done

	libname="$1"
	shift
	destpath="$1"
	if [ -z "$destpath" ]; then
		bbfatal "oe_libinstall: no destination path specified"
	fi

	__runcmd () {
		if [ -z "$silent" ]; then
			echo >&2 "oe_libinstall: $*"
		fi
		$*
	}

	if [ -z "$dir" ]; then
		dir=`pwd`
	fi

	dotlai=$libname.lai

	# Sanity check that the libname.lai is unique
	number_of_files=`(cd $dir; find . -name "$dotlai") | wc -l`
	if [ $number_of_files -gt 1 ]; then
		bbfatal "oe_libinstall: $dotlai is not unique in $dir"
	fi


	dir=$dir`(cd $dir;find . -name "$dotlai") | sed "s/^\.//;s/\/$dotlai\$//;q"`
	olddir=`pwd`
	__runcmd cd $dir

	lafile=$libname.la

	# If such file doesn't exist, try to cut version suffix
	if [ ! -f "$lafile" ]; then
		libname1=`echo "$libname" | sed 's/-[0-9.]*$//'`
		lafile1=$libname.la
		if [ -f "$lafile1" ]; then
			libname=$libname1
			lafile=$lafile1
		fi
	fi

	if [ -f "$lafile" ]; then
		# libtool archive
		eval `cat $lafile|grep "^library_names="`
		libtool=1
	else
		library_names="$libname.so* $libname.dll.a $libname.*.dylib"
	fi

	__runcmd install -d $destpath/
	dota=$libname.a
	if [ -f "$dota" -o -n "$require_static" ]; then
		rm -f $destpath/$dota
		__runcmd install -m 0644 $dota $destpath/
	fi
	if [ -f "$dotlai" -a -n "$libtool" ]; then
		rm -f $destpath/$libname.la
		__runcmd install -m 0644 $dotlai $destpath/$libname.la
	fi

	for name in $library_names; do
		files=`eval echo $name`
		for f in $files; do
			if [ ! -e "$f" ]; then
				if [ -n "$libtool" ]; then
					bbfatal "oe_libinstall: $dir/$f not found."
				fi
			elif [ -L "$f" ]; then
				__runcmd cp -P "$f" $destpath/
			elif [ ! -L "$f" ]; then
				libfile="$f"
				rm -f $destpath/$libfile
				__runcmd install -m 0755 $libfile $destpath/
			fi
		done
	done

	if [ -z "$libfile" ]; then
		if  [ -n "$require_shared" ]; then
			bbfatal "oe_libinstall: unable to locate shared library"
		fi
	elif [ -z "$libtool" ]; then
		# special case hack for non-libtool .so.#.#.# links
		baselibfile=`basename "$libfile"`
		if (echo $baselibfile | grep -qE '^lib.*\.so\.[0-9.]*$'); then
			sonamelink=`aarch64-oe4t-linux-objdump -p $libfile | grep SONAME | awk '{print $2}'`
			solink=`echo $baselibfile | sed -e 's/\.so\..*/.so/'`
			if [ -n "$sonamelink" -a x"$baselibfile" != x"$sonamelink" ]; then
				__runcmd ln -sf $baselibfile $destpath/$sonamelink
			fi
			__runcmd ln -sf $baselibfile $destpath/$solink
		fi
	fi

	__runcmd cd "$olddir"
}

# line: 2, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra_esp.bbclass
oe_mkespfs() {
	fstype="$1"
	extra_imagecmd=""

	if [ $# -gt 1 ]; then
		shift
		extra_imagecmd=$@
	fi

	# Create a sparse image block.
	bbdebug 1 Executing "dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype seek=28835840 count=0 bs=1024"
	dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype seek=28835840 count=0 bs=1024
	bbdebug 1 "Actual Rootfs size:  `du -s /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs`"
	bbdebug 1 "Actual Partition size: `stat -c '%s' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype`"
	bbdebug 1 Executing "mkfs.vfat -F 32 -I $extra_imagecmd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype "
	mkfs.vfat -F 32 -I $extra_imagecmd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype
	mcopy -i /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype -s /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/* ::/
	# Error codes 0-3 indicate successfull operation of fsck (no errors or errors corrected)
	fsck.vfat -pvfV /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype
}

# line: 75, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
oe_mkext234fs() {
	fstype=$1
	extra_imagecmd=""

	if [ $# -gt 1 ]; then
		shift
		extra_imagecmd=$@
	fi

	# If generating an empty image the size of the sparse block should be large
	# enough to allocate an ext4 filesystem using 4096 bytes per inode, this is
	# about 60K, so dd needs a minimum count of 60, with bs=1024 (bytes per IO)
	eval local COUNT=\"0\"
	eval local MIN_COUNT=\"60\"
	if [ $ROOTFS_SIZE -lt $MIN_COUNT ]; then
		eval COUNT=\"$MIN_COUNT\"
	fi
	# Create a sparse image block
	bbdebug 1 Executing "dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype seek=$ROOTFS_SIZE count=$COUNT bs=1024"
	dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype seek=$ROOTFS_SIZE count=$COUNT bs=1024
	bbdebug 1 "Actual Rootfs size:  `du -s /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs`"
	bbdebug 1 "Actual Partition size: `stat -c '%s' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype`"
	bbdebug 1 Executing "mkfs.$fstype -F $extra_imagecmd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs"
	mkfs.$fstype -F $extra_imagecmd /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs
	# Error codes 0-3 indicate successfull operation of fsck (no errors or errors corrected)
	fsck.$fstype -pvfD /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.$fstype || [ $? -le 3 ]
}

# line: 118, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
oe_mksquashfs() {
    local comp=$1; shift
    local extra_imagecmd="$@"

    if [ "$comp" = "zstd" ]; then
        suffix="zst"
    fi

    # Use the bitbake reproducible timestamp instead of the hardcoded squashfs one
    export SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=$(stat -c '%Y' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs)
    mksquashfs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.squashfs${comp:+-}${suffix:-$comp} -noappend ${comp:+-comp }$comp $extra_imagecmd
}

# line: 143, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image_types.bbclass
oe_mkvfatfs() {
    mkfs.vfat $@ -C /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.vfat ${ROOTFS_SIZE}
    mcopy -i "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/deploy-demo-image-full-image-complete/demo-image-full-p3768-0000-p3767-0001.rootfs-20260629221451.vfat" -vsmpQ /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/* ::/
}

# line: 7, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/utils.bbclass
oe_soinstall() {
	# Purpose: Install shared library file and
	#          create the necessary links
	# Example: oe_soinstall libfoo.so.1.2.3 /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image/usr/lib
	libname=`basename $1`
	case "$libname" in
	    *.so)
	        bbfatal "oe_soinstall: Shared library must haved versioned filename (e.g. libfoo.so.1.2.3)"
	        ;;
	esac
	install -m 755 $1 $2/$libname
	sonamelink=`aarch64-oe4t-linux-objdump -p $1 | grep SONAME | awk '{print $2}'`
	if [ -z $sonamelink ]; then
		bbfatal "oe_soinstall: $libname is missing ELF tag 'SONAME'."
	fi
	solink=`echo $libname | sed -e 's/\.so\..*/.so/'`
	ln -sf $libname $2/$sonamelink
	ln -sf $libname $2/$solink
}

# line: 602, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/package.bbclass
packagedata_translate_pr_autoinc() {
    find /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/pkgdata-pdata-input -type f | xargs --no-run-if-empty \
        sed -e 's,@PRSERV_PV_AUTOINC@,AUTOINC,g' \
            -e 's,@EXTENDPRAUTO@,,g' -i
}

# line: 395, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass
populate_sdk_log_check() {
	for target in $*
	do
		lf_path="`dirname ${BB_LOGFILE}`/log.do_$target.125805"

		echo "log_check: Using $lf_path as logfile"

		if [ -e "$lf_path" ]; then
			rpm_log_check $target $lf_path
		else
			echo "Cannot find logfile [$lf_path]"
		fi
		echo "Logfile is clean"
	done
}

# line: 199, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
read_only_rootfs_hook() {
	# Tweak the mount option and fs_passno for rootfs in fstab
	if [ -f /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/fstab ]; then
		sed -i -e '/^[#[:space:]]*\/dev\/root/{s/defaults/ro/;s/\([[:space:]]*[[:digit:]]\)\([[:space:]]*\)[[:digit:]]$/\1\20/}' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/fstab
	fi

	# Tweak the "mount -o remount,rw /" command in busybox-inittab inittab
	if [ -f /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/inittab ]; then
		sed -i 's|/bin/mount -o remount,rw /|/bin/mount -o remount,ro /|' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/inittab
	fi

	# If we're using openssh and the /etc/ssh directory has no pre-generated keys,
	# we should configure openssh to use the configuration file /etc/ssh/sshd_config_readonly
	# and the keys under /var/run/ssh.
	# If overlayfs-etc is used this is not done as /etc is treated as writable
	# If stateless-rootfs is enabled this is always done as we don't want to save keys then
	if true; then
		if [ -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh ]; then
			if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key ]; then
				echo "SYSCONFDIR=\${SYSCONFDIR:-/etc/ssh}" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/ssh
				echo "SSHD_OPTS=" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/ssh
			else
				echo "SYSCONFDIR=\${SYSCONFDIR:-/var/run/ssh}" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/ssh
				echo "SSHD_OPTS='-f /etc/ssh/sshd_config_readonly'" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/ssh
			fi
		fi

		# Also tweak the key location for dropbear in the same way.
		if [ -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/dropbear ]; then
			if [ ! -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/dropbear/dropbear_rsa_host_key ]; then
				if ! grep -q "^DROPBEAR_RSAKEY_DIR=" /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear ; then
					echo "DROPBEAR_RSAKEY_DIR=/var/lib/dropbear" >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear
				fi
			fi
		fi
	fi

	if false; then
		# Change the value of ROOTFS_READ_ONLY in /etc/default/rcS to yes
		if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/rcS ]; then
			sed -i 's/ROOTFS_READ_ONLY=no/ROOTFS_READ_ONLY=yes/' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/rcS
		fi
		# Run populate-volatile.sh at rootfs time to set up basic files
		# and directories to support read-only rootfs.
		if [ -x /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/init.d/populate-volatile.sh ]; then
			/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/init.d/populate-volatile.sh
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 389, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
remove_init_link() {
	if [ -h /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init ]; then
		LINKFILE=/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs`readlink /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init`
		rm /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init
		cp $LINKFILE /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/sbin/init
	fi
}

# line: 691, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/image.bbclass
reproducible_final_image_task() {
    if [ "$REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS" = "" ]; then
        REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS=`git -C "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers" log -1 --pretty=%ct 2>/dev/null` || true
        if [ "$REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS" = "" ]; then
            REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS=`stat -c%Y /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/conf/bitbake.conf`
        fi
    fi
    # Set mtime of all files to a reproducible value
    bbnote "reproducible_final_image_task: mtime set to $REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS"
    find  /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs -print0 | xargs -0 touch -h  --date=@$REPRODUCIBLE_TIMESTAMP_ROOTFS
}

# line: 451, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
rootfs_check_host_user_contaminated() {
	contaminated="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sources/demo-image-full-1.0/host-user-contaminated.txt"
	HOST_USER_UID="$(PSEUDO_UNLOAD=1 id -u)"
	HOST_USER_GID="$(PSEUDO_UNLOAD=1 id -g)"

	find "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs" -path "/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/home" -prune -o \
	    -user "$HOST_USER_UID" -print -o -group "$HOST_USER_GID" -print >"$contaminated"

	sed -e "s,/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs,," $contaminated | while read line; do
		bbwarn "Path in the rootfs is owned by the same user or group as the user running bitbake:" $line `ls -lan /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/$line`
	done

	if [ -s "$contaminated" ]; then
		bbwarn "/etc/passwd:" `cat /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/passwd`
		bbwarn "/etc/group:" `cat /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/group`
	fi
}

# line: 507, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
rootfs_reproducible() {
	if [ "1520598896" != "" ]; then
		# Convert UTC into %4Y%2m%2d%2H%2M%2S
		sformatted=`date -u -d @1520598896 +%4Y%2m%2d%2H%2M%2S`
		echo $sformatted > /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/version
		bbnote "rootfs_reproducible: set /etc/version to $sformatted"

		if [ -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/gconf ]; then
			find /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/gconf -name '%gconf.xml' -print0 | xargs -0r \
			sed -i -e 's@\bmtime="[0-9][0-9]*"@mtime="'1520598896'"@g'
		fi

		if [ -f /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/var/lib/opkg/status ]; then
			sed -i 's/^Installed-Time: .*/Installed-Time: 1520598896/' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/var/lib/opkg/status
		fi
	fi
}

}

# line: 440, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
rootfs_trim_schemas() {
	for schema in /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/gconf/schemas/*.schemas
	do
		# Need this in case no files exist
		if [ -e $schema ]; then
			oe-trim-schemas $schema > $schema.new
			mv $schema.new $schema
		fi
	done
}

}

# line: 708, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass
sdk_ext_postinst() {
	printf "\nExtracting buildtools...\n"
	cd $target_sdk_dir
	env_setup_script="$target_sdk_dir/environment-setup-aarch64-oe4t-linux"
        if [ -n "${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER}" ]; then
		printf "buildtools\ny" | ./${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER} > buildtools.log || { printf 'ERROR: buildtools installation failed:\n' ; cat buildtools.log ; echo "printf 'ERROR: this SDK was not fully installed and needs reinstalling\n'" >> $env_setup_script ; exit 1 ; }

		# Delete the buildtools tar file since it won't be used again
		rm -f ./${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER}
		# We don't need the log either since it succeeded
		rm -f buildtools.log

		# Make sure when the user sets up the environment, they also get
		# the buildtools-tarball tools in their path.
		echo "# Save and reset OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT as buildtools may change it" >> $env_setup_script
		echo "SAVED=\"\$OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT\"" >> $env_setup_script
		echo ". $target_sdk_dir/buildtools/environment-setup*" >> $env_setup_script
		echo "export OECORE_NATIVE_SYSROOT=\"\$SAVED\"" >> $env_setup_script
	fi

	# Allow bitbake environment setup to be ran as part of this sdk.
	echo "export OE_SKIP_SDK_CHECK=1" >> $env_setup_script
	# Work around runqemu not knowing how to get this information within the eSDK
	echo "export DEPLOY_DIR_IMAGE=$target_sdk_dir/tmp/deploy/images/p3768-0000-p3767-0001" >> $env_setup_script

	# A bit of another hack, but we need this in the path only for devtool
	# so put it at the end of $PATH.
	echo "export PATH=\"$target_sdk_dir/${esdk_tools_path}:\$PATH\"" >> $env_setup_script

	echo "printf 'SDK environment now set up; additionally you may now run devtool to perform development tasks.\nRun devtool --help for further details.\n'" >> $env_setup_script

	# Warn if trying to use external bitbake and the ext SDK together
	echo "(which bitbake > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'WARNING: attempting to use the extensible SDK in an environment set up to run bitbake - this may lead to unexpected results. Please source this script in a new shell session instead.') || true" >> $env_setup_script

	if [ "$prepare_buildsystem" != "no" -a -n "${SDK_BUILDTOOLS_INSTALLER}" ]; then
		printf "Preparing build system...\n"
		# dash which is /bin/sh on Ubuntu will not preserve the
		# current working directory when first ran, nor will it set $1 when
		# sourcing a script. That is why this has to look so ugly.
		LOGFILE="$target_sdk_dir/preparing_build_system.log"
		sh -c ". buildtools/environment-setup* > $LOGFILE 2>&1 && cd $target_sdk_dir/`dirname ${oe_init_build_env_path}` && set $target_sdk_dir && . $target_sdk_dir/${oe_init_build_env_path} $target_sdk_dir >> $LOGFILE 2>&1 && python3 $target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py $LOGFILE ''" || { echo "printf 'ERROR: this SDK was not fully installed and needs reinstalling\n'" >> $env_setup_script ; exit 1 ; }
	fi
	if [ -e $target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py ]; then
		rm $target_sdk_dir/ext-sdk-prepare.py
	fi
	echo done
}

# line: 668, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_ext.bbclass
sdk_ext_preinst() {
	# Since bitbake won't run as root it doesn't make sense to try and install
	# the extensible sdk as root.
	if [ "`id -u`" = "0" ]; then
		echo "ERROR: The extensible sdk cannot be installed as root."
		exit 1
	fi
	if ! command -v locale > /dev/null; then
		echo "ERROR: The installer requires the locale command, please install it first"
		exit 1
	fi
        # Check setting of LC_ALL set above
	canonicalised_locale=`echo $LC_ALL | sed 's/UTF-8/utf8/'`
	if ! locale -a | grep -q $canonicalised_locale ; then
		echo "ERROR: the installer requires the $LC_ALL locale to be installed (but not selected), please install it first"
		exit 1
	fi
	# The relocation script used by buildtools installer requires python
	if ! command -v python3 > /dev/null; then
		echo "ERROR: The installer requires python3, please install it first"
		exit 1
	fi
	missing_utils=""
	for util in ${SDK_REQUIRED_UTILITIES}; do
		if ! command -v $util > /dev/null; then
			missing_utils="$missing_utils $util"
		fi
	done
	if [ -n "$missing_utils" ] ; then
		echo "ERROR: the SDK requires the following missing utilities, please install them: $missing_utils"
		exit 1
	fi
	SDK_EXTENSIBLE="1"
	if [ "$publish" = "1" ] && [ "full" = "minimal" ] ; then
		EXTRA_TAR_OPTIONS="$EXTRA_TAR_OPTIONS --exclude=sstate-cache"
	fi
}

# line: 158, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/populate_sdk_base.bbclass
sdk_prune_dirs() {
    for d in /dev; do
        rm -rf /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sdk/image/usr/local/oe-sdk-hardcoded-buildpath/sysroots/aarch64-oe4t-linux$d
    done
}

# line: 325, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
serial_autologin_root() {
	if false; then
		# add autologin option to util-linux getty only
		sed -i 's/options="/&--autologin root /' \
			"/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/bin/start_getty"
	elif true; then
		if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/lib/systemd/system/serial-getty@.service ]; then
			sed -i '/^\s*ExecStart\b/ s/getty /&--autologin root /' \
				"/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/lib/systemd/system/serial-getty@.service"
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 278, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
ssh_allow_empty_password() {
	for config in sshd_config sshd_config_readonly; do
		if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh/$config ]; then
			sed -i 's/^[#[:space:]]*PermitEmptyPasswords.*/PermitEmptyPasswords yes/' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh/$config
		fi
	done

	if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/sbin/dropbear ] ; then
		if grep -q DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear 2>/dev/null ; then
			if ! grep -q "DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS=.*-B" /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear ; then
				sed -i 's/^DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS="*\([^"]*\)"*/DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS="\1 -B"/' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear
			fi
		else
			printf '\nDROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS="-B"\n' >> /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear
		fi
	fi

	if [ -d /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/pam.d ] ; then
		for f in `find /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/pam.d/* -type f -exec test -e {} \; -print`
		do
			sed -i 's/nullok_secure/nullok/' $f
		done
	fi
}

# line: 306, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
ssh_allow_root_login() {
	for config in sshd_config sshd_config_readonly; do
		if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh/$config ]; then
			sed -i 's/^[#[:space:]]*PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/ssh/$config
		fi
	done

	if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/sbin/dropbear ] ; then
		if grep -q DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear 2>/dev/null ; then
			sed -i '/^DROPBEAR_EXTRA_ARGS=/ s/-w//' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear
			sed -i '/^# Disallow root/d' /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/default/dropbear
		fi
	fi
}

# line: 925, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/sstate.bbclass
sstate_unpack_package() {
	ZSTD="zstd -T16"
	# Use pzstd if available
	if [ -x "$(command -v pzstd)" ]; then
		ZSTD="pzstd -p 16"
	fi

	tar -I "$ZSTD" -xvpf /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/
	# update .siginfo atime on local/NFS mirror if it is a symbolic link
	[ ! -h /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.siginfo ] || [ ! -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.siginfo ] || touch -a /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.siginfo 2>/dev/null || true
	# update each symbolic link instead of any referenced file
	touch --no-dereference /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/ 2>/dev/null || true
	[ ! -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.sig ] || touch --no-dereference /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.sig 2>/dev/null || true
	[ ! -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.siginfo ] || touch --no-dereference /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/sstate-cache/.siginfo 2>/dev/null || true
}

# line: 174, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
stage_files_for_uniflash() {
    local dest="$1"
    local flash_idx="$2"
    local layout_xml="$3"
    local partnumber partloc partname start_location partsize partfile partattrs partsha
    local which devnum instnum pline
    local partitions_file=""
    which=$(basename "$dest")
    if [ -n "$layout_xml" ]; then
        partitions_file=$(mktemp)
        if ! "./nvflashxmlparse" -t rootfs "$layout_xml" > "$partitions_file"; then
            rm -f "$partitions_file"
            return 1
        fi
    fi
    while IFS=", " read partnumber partloc start_location partsize partfile partattrs partsha; do
        devnum=$(echo "$partloc" | cut -d':' -f 1)
        instnum=$(echo "$partloc" | cut -d':' -f 2)
        partname=$(echo "$partloc" | cut -d':' -f 3)
        if [ -n "$partfile" ]; then
            if ! cp "$partfile" "$dest/"; then
                [ -n "$partitions_file" ] && rm -f "$partitions_file"
                return 1
            fi
        elif [ -n "$partitions_file" ]; then
            while IFS= read -r pline; do
                update_flash_cfg_for_partition "$partname" "$pline" "$dest"
            done < "$partitions_file"
        fi
    done < "$flash_idx"
    [ -n "$partitions_file" ] && rm -f "$partitions_file"
    cp "$flash_idx" "$dest/flash.idx" || return 1
    if [ "$which" = "internal" -a -e flash-upi.idx ]; then
        while IFS=", " read partnumber partloc start_location partsize partfile partattrs partsha; do
            if [ -n "$partfile" ]; then
                cp "$partfile" "$dest/" || return 1
            fi
        done < flash-upi.idx
        cp flash-upi.idx "$dest/" || return 1
    fi
    return 0
}

# line: 79, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/staging.bbclass
sysroot_stage_all() {
	sysroot_stage_dirs /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/image /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/sysroot-destdir
}

# line: 49, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/staging.bbclass
sysroot_stage_dir() {
	src="$1"
	dest="$2"
	# if the src doesn't exist don't do anything
	if [ ! -d "$src" ]; then
		 return
	fi

	mkdir -p "$dest"
	rdest=$(realpath --relative-to="$src" "$dest")
	(
		cd $src
		find . -print0 | cpio --null -pdlu $rdest
	)
}

# line: 65, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-global/staging.bbclass
sysroot_stage_dirs() {
	from="$1"
	to="$2"

	for dir in      /usr/include     /usr/lib     /usr/lib     /usr/lib     /usr/share     /sysroot-only ; do
		sysroot_stage_dir "$from$dir" "$to$dir"
	done

	# Remove directories we do not care about
	for dir in      /usr/share/man     /usr/share/doc     /usr/share/info     /usr/share/X11/locale     /usr/share/applications     /usr/share/bash-completion     /usr/share/fonts     /usr/share/gtk-doc/html     /usr/share/installed-tests     /usr/share/locale     /usr/share/pixmaps     /usr/share/terminfo     /usr/lib/demo-image-full/ptest ; do
		rm -rf "$to$dir"
	done
}

# line: 179, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta/classes-recipe/rootfs-postcommands.bbclass
systemd_handle_machine_id() {
    if false; then
        # Create machine-id
        # 20:12 < mezcalero> koen: you have three options: a) run systemd-machine-id-setup at install time, b) have / read-only and an empty file there (for stateless) and c) boot with / writable
        touch /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/machine-id
    fi
    # In order to be backward compatible with the previous OE-core specific (re)implementation of systemctl
    # we need to touch machine-id when handling presets and when the rootfs is NOT stateless
    if true; then
        touch /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/etc/machine-id
        if [ -e /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs/usr/lib/systemd/systemd ]; then
            systemctl --root="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs" --preset-mode=enable-only preset-all
            systemctl --root="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/rootfs" --global --preset-mode=enable-only preset-all
        fi
    fi
}

# line: 556, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
tegra_mksparse() {
    PATH="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot-native/usr/bin/tegra-flash:$PATH"
    mksparse -b 4096 --fillpattern=0 "$1" "$2"
}

# line: 40, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/tegra-uefi-signing.bbclass
tegra_uefi_attach_sign() {
    cp "$1" "$1.signed"
    if [ -n "" -a -n "" ]; then
        openssl cms -sign -signer "" -inkey "" -binary -in "$1" -outform der -out "$1".sig.tmp
        truncate --size=%2048 "$1.signed"
        cat "$1".sig.tmp >> "$1.signed"
        rm "$1".sig.tmp
    fi
}

# line: 25, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/tegra-uefi-signing.bbclass
tegra_uefi_sbsign() {
    if [ -n "" -a -n "" ]; then
        sbsign --key "" --cert "" --output "$1" "$1"
    fi
}

# line: 32, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/tegra-uefi-signing.bbclass
tegra_uefi_split_sign() {
    if [ -n "" -a -n "" ]; then
        openssl cms -sign -signer "" -inkey "" -binary -in "$1" -outform der -out "$1".sig
    fi
}

# line: 285, file: /home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/layers/meta-tegra/classes-recipe/image_types_tegra.bbclass
tegraflash_create_flash_config() {
    local destfile="$1"
    local lnxfile="$2"
    local infile="$3"

    [ -n "$infile" ] || infile="/home/charlie/Git/yocto-cos/build/tmp/work/p3768_0000_p3767_0001-oe4t-linux/demo-image-full/1.0/recipe-sysroot/usr/share/tegraflash/internal-flash.xml"

    sed \
        -e"s,LNXFILE_b,$lnxfile," \
        -e"s,LNXFILE,$lnxfile," -e"s,LNXSIZE,83886080," \
        -e"s,TOSFILE,tos-optee_t234.img," \
        -e"s,EKSFILE,eks.img," \
        -e"s,RECNAME,recovery," -e"s,RECSIZE,83886080," -e"s,RECDTB-NAME,recovery-dtb," \
        -e"/RECFILE/d" -e"/RECDTB-FILE/d" -e"/BOOTCTRL-FILE/d" -e"/RECDTB_FILE/d" -e"/REC_ALT_FILE/d" \
        -e"/RECDTB_ALT_FILE/d" -e"/ESP_ALT_FILE/d" \
        -e"/IST_UCODE/d" -e"/IST_BPMPFW/d" -e"/IST_ICTBIN/d" -e"/IST_TESTIMG/d" -e"/IST_RTINFO/d" -e"/IST_RTID/d" \
        -e"s,APPSIZE,29527900160," \
        -e"s,RECROOTFSSIZE,314572800," \
        -e"s,APPUUID_b,," -e"s,APPUUID,," \
	-e"s,ESP_FILE,esp.img," -e"/VARSTORE_FILE/d" \
	-e"s,EXT_NUM_SECTORS,119537664," \
	-e"s,INT_NUM_SECTORS,119537664," \
	"$infile" \
        > "$destfile"
}
